intended_use: Clarius AI is intended to semi-automatically place calipers for non-invasive measurements of musculoskeletal structures (e.g., Achilles' tendon, plantar fascia, patellar tendon) on ultrasound data acq
intended_use_full: Clarius AI is intended to semi-automatically place calipers for non-invasive measurements of musculoskeletal structures (e.g., Achilles' tendon, plantar fascia, patellar tendon) on ultrasound data acquired by the Clarius Ultrasound Scanner (i.e., L7 and L15). The user shall be a healthcare professional trained and qualified in MSK (musculoskeletal) ultrasound. The user shall retain the ultimate responsibility of ascertaining the measurements based on standard practices and clinical judgment.
target_condition: Musculoskeletal pathology requiring tendon thickness measurement
ground_truth: For AI model validation: manual annotation of tendon regions by clinical scientist. For verification testing: expert clinicians' manual caliper placement by licensed clinicians with musculoskeletal ultrasound experience.
other_metrics: Dice score: 96%; mean IoU: 94% for tendon segmentation; measurement accuracy non-inferiority test p-value: 9.0 x 10-7 with equivalence margin of 20%; mean difference between differences: 0.03% (95% CI (-0.05)-(-0.01))
